title: Ennadi Mayavi Nee Lyrics in Tamil
stanzas:
ei, en thalaikkerura
pon thadam podura
en uyir aadura
ennadi maayavi nee

en nelam maathura
andharamaakkura
en nenjam kaattura.

patta kaththi thookki
ippo mittaai narukkura.
vittaa nenja vaari
un pattaa kirukkura

ei, en thalaikkerura
pon thadam podura
en uyir aadura
ennadi mayaavi nee

en nelam maathura
andharamaakkura
en nejam kaattura.

vandaa suthum kaathu
enna rendaa udaikkuthe
summa ninna kaadhal
ulla nandaa thulaikkuthe

dhenam kotti theekkavaa
oru muttaal megamaa
unna suththi vazhvavaa
unna kottaa kaagamaa

paravaye
parandhu povomaa
maraname
marandhu povamaa
uppu kaathula
idhu panneer kaalama.
tamilStanzas:
ஏய், என் தலைக்கேறுற
பொன் தடம் போடுற
என் உயிர் ஆடுற
என்னடி மாயாவி நீ

என் நெலம் மாத்துற
அந்தரமாக்குற
என் நெஞ்சம்  காட்டுற.

பட்டா கத்தி தூக்கி
இப்போ மிட்டாய் நறுக்குற.
விட்டா நெஞ்ச வாரி
உன் பட்டா கிறுக்குற

ஏய், என் தலைக்கேறுற
பொன் தடம் போடுற
என் உயிர் ஆடுற
என்னடி மாயாவி நீ

என் நெலம் மாத்துற
அந்தரமாக்குற
என் நெஞ்சம்  காட்டுற.

வண்டா சுத்தம் காத்து
என்ன ரெண்டா உடைக்குதே
சும்மா நின்ன காதல்
உள்ள நண்டா துளைக்குதே

தெனம் கொட்டி தீக்கவா
ஒரு முட்டாள் மேகமா
உன்ன சுத்தி வாழவா
உன்ன கோட்டா காகமா

பறவையே பறந்து போவோமா
மரணமே மறந்து போவோமா
உப்பு காத்துல இது பன்னீர் காலமா .

enrichedMetadata.faq:
Frequently Asked Questions

What is the meaning of the song 'Ennadi Mayavi Nee'?

The song expresses deep emotions of love and longing, reflecting the complexities of romantic relationships.

How does this song fit into the plot of 'Vada Chennai'?

In Vada Chennai, this song underscores the protagonist's emotional journey and his experiences with love and heartbreak.

Who is the singer of 'Ennadi Mayavi Nee'?

The song is beautifully rendered by Sid Sriram, known for his soulful and emotive singing style.

Who composed the music for this song?

The music for 'Ennadi Mayavi Nee' was composed by Santhosh Narayanan, who is acclaimed for his innovative soundscapes.

When was 'Ennadi Mayavi Nee' released?

The song was released on October 4, 2018.
enrichedMetadata.summary: In 'Ennadi Mayavi Nee', the protagonist expresses his deep feelings of love and yearning, encapsulating the emotional turmoil of romantic relationships. The song's poignant lyrics and Sid Sriram's soulful rendition evoke a sense of nostalgia and longing. Set against the backdrop of Vada Chennai, it highlights the complexities of love amidst life's challenges. The melody resonates with anyone who has experienced the bittersweet nature of love.
enrichedMetadata.high_ctr_intro: Ennadi Mayavi Nee from Vada Chennai is a hauntingly beautiful melody that captures the essence of love and longing. Sid Sriram's soulful voice, combined with Santhosh Narayanan's mesmerizing composition, creates an unforgettable listening experience. This song resonates deeply with anyone who has felt the bittersweet pangs of romance.
stanzaMeanings: Hey, the golden path that leads to my head is where my life is lost, what kind of illusion are you?
My land is sweet and enchanting, my heart is revealing it.
Taking a sharp knife now, it is cutting through the mist. If it leaves, my heart will wander, your song is playing.
Hey, the golden path that leads to my head is where my life is lost, what kind of illusion are you?
My land is sweet and enchanting, my heart is revealing it.
The wind that comes around is just a breeze, your love is simply floating in the air.
With a touch of sweetness, will you live like a cloud? Will you wrap me like a blanket?
Shall we fly away, forgetting death? In this salty water, let’s make it a rainy season.
